name: Lithium Battery Walk-Behind Floor Scrubber
description:
The BC500 effortlessly cleans an area of up to 10,000 m², achieving streak-free floor cleaning through integrated scrubbing, washing and vacuuming. It offers dual battery options (lithium-ion & lead-acid), ensuring worry-free operation in various working environments.

Key Features:
1. Standard lithium battery - stable performance, long runtime
2. Large-capacity tanks - reduce frequent refills for non-stop cleaning
3. Compact body - can flexibly turn and maneuver in narrow spaces
4. Large brush deck paired with curved squeegee - cleaning efficiency up to 2350 m²/h
5. Ergonomic handle - enables effortless pushing and comfortable operation
6. Rotomolded body - rugged structure, precision leak-proof design and superior durability

name: Lithium Ride-on Floor Scrubber BC600
description:
The BC600 is an economical choice among small ride-on floor scrubbers, featuring powerful cleaning performance and a compact, flexible design. It integrates scrubbing, washing and waxing functions into one machine, capable of completing multi-floor cleaning tasks while freeing up significant labor.

Key Features:
1. Standard lithium battery - stable performance, long runtime
2. Permanent magnet brushless hub motor for strong cleaning power; all-copper AC motor with overheat protection; quiet ball bearings for reduced noise
3. Front-wheel drive, flexible steering with a turning radius of only 1m
4. 21-inch brush deck with curved squeegee - cleaning efficiency up to 3360 m²/h
5. Lifting handle for semi-automatic brush loading/unloading for safety

name: Lithium Ride-on Floor Scrubber BC1000
description:
Equipped with a standard lithium battery and permanent magnet brushless motor, the BC1000 delivers strong endurance and stable output performance. Large-capacity solution and recovery tanks eliminate the need for frequent refills. Incorporating automotive-grade design principles, it offers a comfortable driving experience for more efficient cleaning.

Key Features:
1. 19" dual brush deck with a scrubbing width up to 1000mm for upgraded efficiency
2. Auto brush loading/unloading - one-button operation, smart and safe
3. Compact structure fits standard elevators for multi-floor operation
4. Ergonomic wrap-around seat with automotive-grade comfort for prolonged use
5. Dual scrub brushes + curved squeegee - working efficiency up to 6000 m²/h, saving significant labor costs

name: Lithium Ride-on Floor Scrubber BC1250
description:
The BC1250 is a new-generation professional ride-on floor scrubber, offering the latest cleaning technology. With a high-capacity battery for extended runtime, it integrates scrubbing, washing and vacuuming in one pass. Designed for heavy-duty workloads, it delivers excellent value for money.

Key Features:
1. Powerful motor with 21" dual brush deck - saves time and labor
2. Energy-efficient with long battery life - up to 35,000 m² per charge
3. PMSM hub motor reduces weight by over 35% compared to similar products; dual rear-wheel silent drive with strong power
4. Full 360° anti-collision design, low center of gravity for stable and safe operation
5. Dual scrub brushes + curved squeegee - working efficiency up to 6600 m²/h
